title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Container Corporation of India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Container Corporation of India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Fleet Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!
